title: Zalingei Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zalingei with a Z-Score of +3.63. Temperatures are critically high, reaching a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Zalingei is causing extreme temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 11.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 36%, and wind speed is at 1.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city is experiencing a critical level of heat, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating a severe anomaly.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on the city.
